rulings.Case Title: PHILIP CHANT et al VS. FEDEX GROUND PACKAGE SYSTEM, INC, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses From Pltf'S To Form Interrogatories, Set Three
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, October 6, 2010, line 1, DEFENDANTS FEDEX GROUND PACKAGE SYSTEM, INC. AND RAFAEL RODRIGUEZ Motion To Compel Further Responses From Plaintiff's To Form Interrogatories, Set Three. GRANTED IN PART. PLAINTIFF TO SUPPLY SPECIFIC REFERENCES TO DEFENDANT'S WEBSITES, THE WEBSITES OF OTHER FEDEX ENTITIES, WEBSITES INCLUDING INFORMATION ON FEDEX GROUND, AND INFORMATION CONTAINED IN OTHER CASES IN WHICH FEDEX GROUND HAS BEEN NAMED AS A DEFENDANT. MOTION DENIED AS TO REMAINDER. COURT FINDS RESPONSES SUFFICIENT UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES PRESENTED. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MONTGOMERY SANSOME LP VS. ZHIAN Z REZAI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearingon Pltf'S Motion For New Trial
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, October 6, 2010, line 2, PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY SANSOME LP'S Notice Of Hearing on Plaintiff's Motion For New Trial. MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL DENIED. DEFENDANT'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS SUSTAINED. MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT TO ADD COSTS GRANTED. THE COURT ADOPTS PLAINTIFF'S PROPOSED ORDER THAT INCLUDES STAYING ENFORCEMENT OF THE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 918. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CHUBB CUSTOM INSURANACE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $4,977 Against Lexington Insurance Co.
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, October 6, 2010, line 2, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PIZZA LLC'S Motion For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $4,977 Against Lexington Insurance Co. GRANTED. THE COURT ADOPTS CALIFORNIA PIZZA'S PROPOSED ORDER GRANTING ITS MOTION FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. THE COURT OVERRULES BOTH PARTIES' OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE. =(302/CWW)
